description: Pigeon or dove by short bill, small head, short neck, short legs and grayish plumage.  Inca Dove by small size, scalloped look caused by the dark tips of most of the bird's feathers on its back head and breast.  Long tail relative to body and in comparison with the other small dove, Common Ground Dove and much smaller than the nearby Eurasian Collared-Doves.  Gray wings, short with very little primary projection. Silent and seen by me only perched near the trunk of an aspen up about 7 feet off the ground on a small diameter branch.  Seen at times with its eyes closed.
photographer: Photographer: bill maynard, bill maynard, bill maynard
